github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.instruction: Perform robust script validation for the PowerShell execution environment.
Run a full PowerShell formatter pass for style and indentation.
Generate a script map for navigation.
Use VSCode diagnostics for error and warning detection.
Ensure there are no structural issues or incomplete functions.
Check for proper indentation and formatting.
Detect and remove unused variables or code blocks.
Use safer terminology throughout the script.
Ensure consistent logging throughout the script.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: PowerShell Script Validation
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Validates PowerShell scripts for execution environment compatibility and style adherence.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: PowerShell Formatter
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Formats PowerShell scripts for consistent style and indentation.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: Script Map Generation
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Generates a navigable map of the PowerShell script structure.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: PowerShell Diagnostics
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Uses VSCode diagnostics to detect errors and warnings in PowerShell scripts.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: PowerShell Structural Check
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Checks for structural issues and incomplete functions in PowerShell scripts.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.name: PowerShell Indentation Check
github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.sugge.description: Ensures proper indentation and formatting in PowerShell scripts.
